name: SOLID Staked SOL
description: 🔗 One SOLID represents 10 SOL. ⚡ SOLID links all Solana tokens that are the wrapped and liquid staked versions, creating one unified bridge of stake and liquidity across major pools. 🛤️🌟 A hefty portion of fees pour into backing that's everlasting in locked pools. 🔒💰 These pools are the mercantile markets for SOLID's favorite tokens on Solana. 💎 100% of SOLID is liquid-minted, staying liquid-backed by wrapped and liquid staked SOL. ⚡ SOLID is liquid-minted when the equivalent amount of wrapped or liquid staked SOL is used to buy SOLID direct from the pools that were blessed with 100% of Max supply. 🏰 Welcome citizen, you are now helping the roads of stake and cryptos to be linked, creating bridges of liquidity between validators and DeFi by holding SOLID. 🔗 This token and its sisters SOLOMON and QUICK are for entertainment purposes only, and are not a vehicle for investment, nor do they promise returns or redeemability. Project subject to change without notice. We operate on our interpretation of the highest will, but make no promises. 🙏
